title: AI Side Hustle EN
author: Deokgu Studio
description:
The honest, no-fluff playbook for turning ChatGPT and other AI tools into a real second income stream - without quitting your job, learning to code, or buying a $997 course.

This is a focused 31-page blueprint, not a 400-page brick. Every page exists to move you closer to your first paying client or first dollar of digital-product revenue.

Who it's for:
- 9-to-5 workers who want $500-$3,000 extra per month
- Stay-at-home parents and students with limited weekly hours
- Existing freelancers who want to multiply their output with AI

What's inside:
- 7 vetted AI side hustles ranked by start-up cost, time to first dollar, and ceiling
- Step-by-step launch checklists for each (no "and then magic happens" gaps)
- Pricing scripts, outreach templates, and the exact tools used
- Common pitfalls that kill beginners - and how to avoid them
- A weekly action tracker so you ship, not just read

Built for evenings and weekends. Most readers can launch their first offer within 14 days of finishing the book.

Stop bookmarking AI hustle threads on Reddit. Get the blueprint, pick one path, and start this weekend.
